title: Coty Inc. — Multi-Brand Shopify Storefronts
shortDescription: Led frontend for 4 international Coty storefronts across 15+ countries with headless CMS, geo-redirection, and localisation.
description: Led frontend development for four international storefronts across the Coty brand portfolio, serving 15+ countries. Implemented headless CMS integration, geo-based redirection, and multi-currency/language support. Delivered scalable, performance-optimised solutions in an Agile environment as Tech Lead at Photon/Sedin.
challenges: Multi-brand, multi-region architecture with shared components while preserving distinct brand identities and locale-specific content.
solutions: Headless CMS-driven content models, geo-based routing, and reusable design-system components with brand-level theming.

title: O'Reilly Auto Parts — Microfrontend Platform
shortDescription: High-traffic React + AEM microfrontend platform with SSR/SSG for millions of monthly US visitors.
description: Built a high-traffic microfrontend architecture serving millions of monthly users across the United States. Implemented SSR and SSG strategies for SEO performance and fast page loads on a large-scale retail platform using React and Adobe Experience Manager (AEM).
challenges: Coordinating multiple microfrontends with consistent performance and SEO across a massive retail catalogue.
solutions: MFE boundaries with shared shell, SSG/SSR per route type, and performance budgets aligned to Core Web Vitals.

title: Redsea — Headless E-Commerce (Saudi Arabia)
shortDescription: Headless Shopify + Next.js storefront for one of Saudi Arabia's largest retail chains.
description: Built headless Shopify storefront for Redsea, one of Saudi Arabia's leading retail chains, using Next.js. Delivered a fully responsive, mobile-first experience for web and mobile app users with performance-focused architecture.
challenges: Mobile-first commerce at scale with headless Shopify and fast catalogue browsing on slower networks.
solutions: Next.js SSR/ISR, image optimisation, and a component architecture tuned for touch-first shopping flows.

title: Universal Music Group — Shopify Checkout Extension
shortDescription: Custom tax form integrated into Shopify checkout for UMG's global music commerce platform.
description: Developed and integrated a custom tax form within the Shopify checkout flow for Universal Music Group's global music platform, extending checkout with compliant data capture without leaving the native Shopify experience.
challenges: Extending Shopify checkout UI while meeting tax compliance and checkout performance requirements.
solutions: Shopify Checkout UI extension with validated form state and server-side tax handling integration.

title: RedIY — Real Estate Platform (Australia)
shortDescription: Private property listings with Google Maps API for location-based search across Australia.
description: Built a private property listing platform integrating Google Maps JavaScript API for location-based property search. Delivered responsive listing flows, map-driven discovery, and Rails-backed data integration for the Australian market.
challenges: Map-heavy UI with performant marker clustering and sync with filtered listing results.
solutions: Redux-managed filter state, debounced map bounds updates, and lazy-loaded listing cards.

title: Sir The Label — Fashion E-Commerce
shortDescription: Premium fashion storefront with refined UX, lookbook-driven merchandising, and performant product discovery.
description: Frontend development for Sir The Label's e-commerce experience — balancing editorial lookbook content with conversion-focused product pages and mobile shopping flows.
challenges: Brand-forward editorial layouts without sacrificing checkout performance.
solutions: Lazy-loaded media, optimised theme sections, and reusable product card components.

title: Pura — Smart Home Fragrance
shortDescription: E-commerce and product storytelling for a connected home fragrance brand.
description: Built customer-facing storefront and marketing experiences for Pura's smart fragrance ecosystem, focusing on product education, subscription flows, and responsive merchandising.
challenges: Explaining connected hardware benefits within a traditional e-commerce funnel.
solutions: Modular content sections, interactive product highlights, and clear CTA paths for device + refill purchases.

title: Educated Beard — Grooming E-Commerce
shortDescription: Shopify storefront for a men's grooming brand with subscription-friendly product pages.
description: Developed a Shopify-powered storefront for Educated Beard with brand-consistent styling, subscription-ready product templates, and mobile-first checkout optimisation.
challenges: Subscription UX and variant-heavy product catalogue on a lean theme budget.
solutions: Custom Liquid sections, clear variant selectors, and performance-tuned asset loading.

title: Vanessa Megan — Natural Beauty
shortDescription: Luxury natural beauty e-commerce with ingredient-led storytelling and refined mobile UX.
description: Frontend work for Vanessa Megan's natural beauty platform — ingredient storytelling, collection browsing, and checkout flows aligned with a premium brand aesthetic.
challenges: Rich editorial content alongside fast product listing pages on mobile.
solutions: Progressive image loading, section-based theme architecture, and accessible colour/contrast tokens.

title: SoundHealth — Health & Wellness Platform
shortDescription: Patient-facing health platform UI with accessible forms and responsive care journeys.
description: Built responsive UI for SoundHealth's digital health experiences — appointment flows, educational content, and accessible form patterns for diverse user groups.
challenges: Accessibility and clarity for health-critical user journeys across devices.
solutions: WCAG-focused components, form validation patterns, and responsive layouts tested on mobile-first breakpoints.

title: RCC Gemini — Corporate Web Platform
shortDescription: Corporate marketing site with CMS-driven pages and performance-focused React frontend.
description: Delivered a corporate web platform for RCC Gemini with CMS-integrated page building, lead-capture forms, and a maintainable React component library.
challenges: Marketing team autonomy for page updates without developer involvement per launch.
solutions: Composable page sections mapped to CMS blocks and preview-friendly content workflows.
